purpose: Defines the two new DM profile-exchange rumor kinds (profile-request, profile-announce), a module-load sentinel-collision assertion against every reserved kind in the codebase, and the encode/parse/validate functions for both wire payloads. Pure module — no side effects, no IO.

public_api.name: DM_PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND
public_api.description: Rumor kind for a profile-request. Distinct from PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND=30 (marmot/profileRequestSync.ts, a different transport).

public_api.name: ProfileRequestPayload
public_api.description: Wire content shape for a profile-request rumor. Seam contract consumed by story 03 (send.ts) and story 04 (receive.ts).

public_api.name: ProfileAnnouncePayload
public_api.signature: type { type: 'profile-announce'; nickname: string; avatar: { imageUrl: string }; updatedAt: string }
public_api.description: Wire content shape for a profile-announce rumor. avatar is never null in this type — the parser rejects null/absent avatar as malformed before a value of this type is ever returned. Seam contract consumed by story 03 and story 04.

public_api.name: encodeProfileRequest
public_api.description: Serializes a profile-request payload to a JSON string for the rumor content field.

public_api.name: parseProfileRequest
public_api.description: Parses/validates rumor content into a ProfileRequestPayload. Returns a tagged ok/malformed result, never throws.

public_api.name: encodeProfileAnnounce
public_api.signature: encodeProfileAnnounce(input: { nickname: string; avatar: { imageUrl: string } }): string
public_api.description: Serializes a profile-announce payload, stamping updatedAt at call time (answer-time semantics per spec.md §4). Throws synchronously if avatar is null/absent/imageUrl missing or nickname is empty — refuses to construct a malformed rumor at the source.

public_api.name: parseProfileAnnounce
public_api.description: Parses/validates rumor content into a ProfileAnnouncePayload. Classifies avatar:null, absent avatar, or absent avatar.imageUrl as a distinct 'malformed' result the receive path can branch on before ever reaching contactCache.ts. Never throws.

public_api.name: ParseResult
public_api.signature: type ParseResult<T> = { ok: true; value: T } | { ok: false; reason: ProfileParseReason }
public_api.description: Shared discriminated-union result type for both parsers. reason narrowed from a bare string to ProfileParseReason (gate-remediation sev 2) so story 04's receive-path dispatch is compile-checked against an exhaustive vocabulary.

public_api.name: ProfileParseReason
public_api.description: Exhaustive malformed-parse reason union (gate-remediation sev 2, added post-impl). Consumed by story 04's receive-path dispatch as a typed seam vocabulary instead of an open string.
